creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
The new version of security/fcrackzip 1.0 has been released.
	http://www.goof.com/pcg/marc/fcrackzip.html

Fix: the patch follows:

cvs diff: Diffing .
PORTNAME=	fcrackzip
-PORTVERSION=	0.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.0
 CATEGORIES=	security archivers
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.goof.com/pcg/marc/data/
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
